title: Seed Tweaks
body:
# Seed Tweaks Datapack

*Enhance your Minecraft gardening experience with the Seed Tweaks datapack, designed to transform the way you handle seeds. Say goodbye to seed scarcity and embrace a bountiful harvest with ease!*

### Crafts
![Wheet seed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f59ea70222b1024cfb2312153853617d91a32293.png)
![Melon seed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c86c2a2cbed8e99d8cd919405e816a70c3385cc.png)

- Works with all seed types
- See gallery for more

## New Crafting Recipes:

- **Beetroot Seeds**: Craft with 1 bone meal and 1 beetroot seed to get 3 beetroot seeds.
- **Melon Seeds**: Craft with 1 bone meal and 1 melon seed to get 3 melon seeds.
- **Pumpkin Seeds**: Craft with 1 bone meal and 1 pumpkin seed to get 3 pumpkin seeds.
- **Wheat Seeds**: Craft with 1 bone meal and 1 wheat seed to get 3 wheat seeds.

## How to Use:
1. Download the Seed Tweaks Datapack.
2. Place the downloaded file into the "datapacks" folder in your Minecraft world save.
3. Dive into the world of abundant seed production and gardening ease!

### Cultivate Your Garden:
Immerse yourself in a world where seed abundance is just a craft away. Seed Tweaks empowers you to maximize your crop yields effortlessly, whether you're a seasoned farmer or a casual gardener. Grow, cultivate, and let your fields flourish with endless greenery!
